items.title: McDonald’s commits $200m to regenerative agriculture initiative
items.description: The move underscores McDonald's USA's commitment to sustainable beef sourcing and natural resource stewardship.

items.title: 3 Low-Volatility Stocks with Questionable Fundamentals
items.description: A stock with low volatility can be reassuring, but it doesn’t always mean strong long-term performance. Investors who prioritize stability may miss out on higher-reward opportunities elsewhere.
